description: Multi-tenant internal operations reporting platform for manufacturing companies.

theme.style: Modern corporate, high-contrast, data-dense, hairline borders

core_screens.title: Auth (Login & Register)
core_screens.role: Manual and Google authentication with terms agreement and API configuration.

core_screens.title: Operations Dashboard
core_screens.role: Summary KPI cards, production/efficiency summary, and date range filters.

core_screens.title: Data Log Entry
core_screens.role: Batch data logger with local row queueing and validation.

core_screens.title: Machine Production
core_screens.role: Production records, efficiency statistics, and multi-row downloads.

core_screens.title: Quality Detail Matrix
core_screens.role: Loom/operator matrix display with collapsible detail views.

core_screens.title: Machine Maintenance Log
core_screens.role: Log maintenance checklist with custom options and color-coded status badges.

core_screens.title: Job Orders Master
core_screens.role: Job orders with dynamic custom columns, inline masters quick-creation modals, and selective exports.
